visual_description: A man wearing glasses and a light-colored shirt reclines on a white couch, holding a cigar in his right hand. A woman in a patterned dress leans against him, her left hand resting on his chest and her head near his shoulder. Both are seated on the couch, partially obscured by the angle, with a wooden wall behind them.
audio_description: The audio features a single, high-pitched, and breathy voice with a slow pace.
